# tokens: # List literals: `[` and `]` collect tokens between them into a
# TList Value with elements as-is. The spec subset does NOT evaluate
# list contents — `[ 1 addq 2 ]` is a 3-element list, not a singleton
# `[3]`. (Auto-evaluation is a separate engine feature documented in
#   lengthq — sig [List]. Returns the element count as Integer.
#   first  — sig [List]. Returns the first element, or None on empty.
#   firstq   — [List] forward-prec — first element or None for empty list
#   lengthq  — [List] forward-prec — list length as Integer

note: bare list literal renders as space-separated elements
lengthq consumes the list, returns its size
mixed element types — only count is checked
length of a list of lists
